title: athyrium aequibasale
intro: Athyrium aequibasale, also known as the Chinese lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium aequibasale are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and protect against oxidative stress. Athyrium aequibasale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
